name: should query WR fantasy stats with year splits and sort by points per game, seasonlogs, careerlogs, plays, and keeptradecut
description: Test case for should query WR fantasy stats with year splits and sort by points per game, seasonlogs, careerlogs, plays, and keeptradecut
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2017,2018,2019,2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and "pg"."year" in (2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year") select "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_0", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_overall_score" AS "espn_overall_score_0", "tf10ab6aa2ef9ce40e9149027e3db4030"."v" AS "player_keeptradecut_value_0", "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."year", "player"."pos" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" left join "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819" on "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819.year = t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c.year and "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819"."year" in (2023, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018) left join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and "player_seasonlogs"."year" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."year" and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "opening_days" on "opening_days"."year" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."year" left join "keeptradecut_rankings" as "tf10ab6aa2ef9ce40e9149027e3db4030" on "tf10ab6aa2ef9ce40e9149027e3db4030"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and "tf10ab6aa2ef9ce40e9149027e3db4030"."qb" = 2 and "tf10ab6aa2ef9ce40e9149027e3db4030"."type" = 1 and "tf10ab6aa2ef9ce40e9149027e3db4030"."d" = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', opening_days.opening_day) + interval '1 year'))::integer and opening_days.year = (t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c.year) where "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' and player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."points_per_game", "t656309e23a0bbe1d45d84f6eac4f1819"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_overall_score", "tf10ab6aa2ef9ce40e9149027e3db4030"."v", "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."year", "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" asc limit 500
